children.text: (except as provided in subsection (e)); orsection 2802 of this title
.section 2805 of this title
When a decision is made to carry out a project under this section, the Secretary of Defense shall notify the congressional defense committees of that decision.

children.label: A
children.text: enhance military installation resilience;

children.label: B
children.text: enhance mission assurance;

children.label: C
children.text: support mission critical functions; and

children.label: D
children.text: address known vulnerabilities.

children.heading: .—Timing of Projects
children.label: c .—Timing of Projects
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (e)(2), a project may be carried out under this section only after the end of the 14-day period beginning on the date that notification with respect to that project under subsection (b) is received by the congressional defense committees in an electronic medium pursuant to .section 480 of this title
on a military installation;

on a facility used by the Department of Defense that is owned and operated by a State, the District of Columbia, the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, American Samoa, Guam, the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands, or the Virgin Islands, even if the facility is not under the jurisdiction of the Department of Defense, if the Secretary of Defense determines that the facility is subject to significant use by the armed forces for testing or training; or

children.label: A
children.text: a military installation;

children.label: B
children.text: a facility described in paragraph (2); or

children.label: C
children.text: community infrastructure determined by the Secretary concerned to be necessary to maintain, improve, or rapidly reestablish installation mission assurance and mission-essential functions.

children.label: A
children.text: the current estimate of the cost of the project;

children.label: B
children.text: the source of funds for the project; and

children.label: C
children.text: a certification that deferral of the project for inclusion in the next Military Construction Authorization Act would be inconsistent with national security or the protection of health, safety, or environmental quality, as the case may be.

A project carried out under this section using amounts under paragraph (1) may be carried out only after the end of the 7-day period beginning on the date on which a copy of the notification described in paragraph (1) is provided in an electronic medium pursuant to .section 480 of this title

The maximum aggregate amount that the Secretary concerned may obligate from amounts available to the military department concerned for operation and maintenance in any fiscal year for projects under the authority of this subsection is $125,000,000.
The title, location, a brief description of the scope of work, the original project cost estimate, and the current working cost estimate.
The information provided under subsection (b)(2).
Such other information as the Secretary considers appropriate.
